refnamediv.refpurpose: Get the two letter country code from an IPv6 address

refentry.refsect1:
&reftitle.description;
stringgeoip_country_code_by_name_v6 stringhostname
The geoip_country_code_by_name_v6 function will return the two letter country code corresponding to a hostname or an IPv6 address.
This is the IPv6 counterpart of geoip_country_code_by_name and requires the IPv6 version of the GeoIP Country database.

&reftitle.notes;
Please see &url.maxmind.iso3166; for a complete list of possible return values, including special codes.
